basics.name: Mina Samy Tawfik Saad
basics.label: Project Management and PMO Professional | Licensed Pharmacist | Digital Transformation
basics.summary: Project management and PMO professional with experience across healthcare operations, pharmaceutical programs, workflow automation, governance, KPI reporting, stakeholder coordination and cross-functional delivery.

work.name: EVA Pharma & Armanious Foundation
work.position: Senior Coordinator — Digital Transformation & Operational Excellence
work.summary: Leads transformation initiatives, governance, dashboards, workflow improvement, stakeholder alignment and implementation support.
highlights: Supported governance, operational coordination, reporting and portfolio visibility across healthcare support programs exceeding EGP 120M in value
Built KPI dashboards and executive reporting views
Developed SOPs, runbooks and process maps
Identified operational risks, bottlenecks and corrective actions
Designed and delivered training and change-management support

work.name: EVA Pharma & Armanious Foundation
work.summary: Mapped and digitized healthcare workflows, coordinated multidisciplinary stakeholders and supported portfolio reporting and continuous improvement.
highlights: Connected Google Forms to ServiceDesk Plus through Google Apps Script
Created dashboards, SOPs, escalation pathways and role-based guidance

work.name: Masr Bila Marad NGO
work.summary: Supported healthcare program operations, field coordination, logistics, referrals and service delivery.

work.name: Freelance
work.summary: Delivered web, cloud, automation and digital process projects for diverse clients.

projects.name: Medicine Support Hub
projects.description: Bilingual digital-health platform live at medicinesupport.app/medicines. Architected and led end-to-end by Mina Samy Tawfik Saad, integrating 86,000+ Egyptian medicines across 8 role-based workflows with a vision to standardize chronic healthcare delivery for NGOs and PSPs.

projects.name: Employee Support Program Transformation
projects.description: Digitized manual employee healthcare support workflows using ServiceDesk Plus, Google Forms, Google Apps Script, governance, routing, tracking, SOPs, dashboards and training.

projects.name: Chronic Medication Support
projects.description: Multi-stakeholder healthcare program coordination supporting medication continuity, fulfillment visibility and operational escalation.
